openai-codex-github.title: openai/codex 0.144.1
openai-codex-github.summaryText: ## Bug Fixes - Fixed standalone installs failing when GitHub returns compact or reordered release metadata. (#31913) - Ensured macOS package installs expose the code-mode host alongside the `codex` executable. (#31913) - Kept code mode working when the companion host binary is unavailable by falling back to the embedded runtime. (#31913) ## Changelog Full Changelog: https://github.com/openai/codex/compare/rust-v0.144.0...rust-v0.144.1 - #31913 [0.144] Backport installer and code-mode reliabil...
